name: Vercel
summary: Stark monochrome developer-platform look. Ink is the brand; no chromatic accent. Pill CTAs, deep gray scale, subtle stacked shadows.
source: Observed from vercel.com; values are public-site approximations, not official brand assets.

font.license: Geist and Geist Mono are open source (SIL OFL) by Vercel. Free to bundle.

accent.note: There is no chromatic accent. Ink (#171717) is the accent, polarity-flipped onto dark bands.

rules: Use no second accent color. Use ink and polarity-flipped dark bands for emphasis.
Use 100px pill radius on primary marketing CTAs.
Use sentence-case headlines with tight negative tracking.
Use stacked subtle shadows, never heavy drop shadows.
Do not use a display weight above 600.
